# Production Roadmap: [Project Name]

**Generated By**: Virtual Production Lead

## 1. Tech Stack Selection
Based on the GDD, the following AntiGravity Skills are selected:

| Feature | Selected Skill | Justification |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| [Feature Name] | [`skill-name`] | [Why this skill fits] |
| [Feature Name] | [`skill-name`] | [Why this skill fits] |

## 2. Development Phases

### Phase 1: Prototype (The "Greybox")
**Goal**: Verify the Core Loop. No art, just cubes.
- [ ] Initialize Project (`@project-scaffolder`)
- [ ] Implement Basic Movement (`@player-movement-controller`)
- [ ] Implement Camera (`@camera-system-pro`)
- [ ] Basic Interaction (`@universal-input-handler`)

### Phase 2: Vertical Slice (The "MVP")
**Goal**: One fully playable level with art and UI.
- [ ] Core Systems Implementation:
    - [ ] [System A] (`@skill-A`)
    - [ ] [System B] (`@skill-B`)
- [ ] UI Hookup (`@ui-toolkit-modern`)
- [ ] Save/Load System (`@save-load-serialization`)

### Phase 3: Production (Content)
**Goal**: Scale content logic (Enemies, Items).
- [ ] Content Pipeline Setup (`@asset-import-pipeline`)
- [ ] Enemy Spawners (`@horde-wave-logic`)
- [ ] Audio Implementation (`@audio-mixing-system`)

### Phase 4: Polish & Deploy
**Goal**: Optimization and Release.
- [ ] Profiling (`@memory-profiler-expert`)
- [ ] Build Automation (`@build-pipeline-manager`)

## 3. Next Immediate Actions
[List the top 3 specific tasks to start Phase 1]
